summary: Latency-sensitive first-finish smoke testing for Herbowicz consulting site. All backend smoke endpoints and the primary frontend flows (home load, lang toggle, register, admin login, protected-route redirect, booking, logout) verified end-to-end against the public preview URL.
passed: POST /api/auth/register -> 200 returns token + user_id, sets access_token cookie
GET /api/auth/me with cookie -> 200 returns provider=password user
POST /api/auth/login admin grzegorz@herbowicz.com / Leibniz1646! -> 200 (admin seed working)
POST /api/bookings (authed) -> 200 returns booking with id (no _id leak)
GET /api/bookings (authed) -> 200 returns array including the created booking
Home page renders Navigation, Hero (Leibniz quote + portrait), nav-login-btn, lang-toggle, contact-form
Register flow via AuthModal (nav-login-btn -> auth-tab-register -> auth-submit-btn) redirects to /dashboard
Admin login via AuthModal redirects to /dashboard
Booking flow on /dashboard: select calendar date (next month, weekday), click time-slot-10:00, fill booking-topic, submit booking-submit-btn -> booking-success message appears
nav-logout-btn clears session; subsequent /dashboard navigation redirects to /
auth-google-btn is present in AuthModal (BUTTON element; full OAuth flow not testable headlessly per spec)
notes: Resend 403 for non-verified recipients is swallowed by backend as expected (test mode).
Cookies set with samesite=none; secure=true; tested via https preview URL.
Admin user is seeded on startup (login succeeds with credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
